titles.title: It's So Good to Be In the House of the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's so good to be in the house of the Lord again With my brothers and sisters in the house of the Lord again So, let's just praise in the name of the Lord Together with this happy song It's so good to be in the house of the Lord again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come bless the Lord, All ye servants of the Lord, Who stand by night, In the house of the Lord. Lift up your hands, In the Holy Place, And bless the Lord. And bless the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're together again Just praising the Lord. We're together again In one accord. Something good Is going to happen, Something good is in store. We're together again, Just praising the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Wherever I go, I'll praise Him Whenever I can, I'll praise Him, For His love surrounds me like a sea. I'll praise the name of Jesus Lift up the name of Jesus For the name of Jesus lifted me.
